channel.title: ecommerce on apio: microservices platform to create custom business softwares easily.
channel.description: Recent content in ecommerce on apio: microservices platform to create custom business softwares easily.

item.title: Create an Online Store for FREE
item.description: Are you looking for free and easy way to setup your online store? We have a solution for you - introducing Chopin by apio: a simple online store creator that allows you to configure your online store in a few clicks for free. Combined with Waitress (apio’s google sheet as API microservice), you can setup a webstore with just two google sheets. Try now and start selling your products online.
